# Convicta Docs

> Public documentation for Convicta — a news-to-action ecosystem for people who follow world
> events and prediction markets. Convicta ingests news from 1,600+ sources in 20 languages and,
> when a story moves a market, connects it to the exact Polymarket prediction market it affects.
> Every news-to-market match is traceable to the explicit rule that produced it — no black-box
> similarity scores. Language models build the underlying knowledge and write summaries; they
> never make the live match.

One engine, four surfaces: Convicta News (Telegram Mini App, @Convicta_news_bot), Polymarket
Pulse (Telegram Mini App, @Convicta_pulse_bot), a web app (sign in with Google, email, or
Telegram), and a Chrome extension that adds alerts, matched news and the Edge fair-value
estimate directly onto polymarket.com.

Plans: Free ($0), News+ ($6/mo · $60/yr), Pulse Pro ($12/mo · $120/yr), Pulse Edge
($20/mo · $200/yr, includes News+). Currently in open community testing — everything is free:
every new user gets a two-month grant on the full-featured tier; nothing charges automatically.

## Docs

- [Introduction — what is Convicta?](https://docs.convicta.ai/)
- [Getting started (all four surfaces)](https://docs.convicta.ai/getting-started/)
- [Getting started: Convicta News](https://docs.convicta.ai/getting-started/convicta-news/)
- [Getting started: Polymarket Pulse](https://docs.convicta.ai/getting-started/polymarket-pulse/)
- [Getting started: Web app](https://docs.convicta.ai/getting-started/web-version/)
- [Getting started: Chrome extension](https://docs.convicta.ai/getting-started/chrome-extension/)
- [Features — everything each product does](https://docs.convicta.ai/features/)
- [Settings map — every user-facing setting](https://docs.convicta.ai/settings/)
- [Pricing](https://docs.convicta.ai/pricing/)
- [Roadmap](https://docs.convicta.ai/roadmap/)
- [Support & FAQ](https://docs.convicta.ai/support-faq/)
- [Privacy Policy](https://docs.convicta.ai/privacy-policy/)
- [Terms of Service](https://docs.convicta.ai/terms-of-service/)

Contact: the /feedback command inside the Telegram bots @Convicta_news_bot and
@Convicta_pulse_bot. Provider: Adoriasoft LLC.
